title: White-label DBaaS live in 30 days: serving 20,000+ customers
tagline: Launched a fully-featured public DBaaS in just 30 days
description: A leading public cloud provider integrated KubeDB into their managed Kubernetes service and went live with a complete white-label Database-as-a-Service offering in record time.
company_note: A leading public cloud provider with 15+ years of experience, 10+ data centers, and serving 20,000+ businesses across multiple continents.
customer_description: A leading public cloud provider with 15+ years of experience, 10+ data centers, and serving 20,000+ businesses across multiple continents.
compliance_note: Open-core · Apache 2.0 · Certified on OpenShift, Rancher, EKS, AKS, GKE & more

hero_right_metrics.label: ENGINES
hero_right_metrics.sublabel: PostgreSQL • MySQL • Redis • MongoDB • Kafka & more

challenge_title: Launch a competitive public DBaaS - fast
challenge_summary: Company X needed a fully managed, white-label Database-as-a-Service to complement their managed Kubernetes offering, without building everything from scratch.
challenge_key_pains: Rapid delivery · Multi-engine support · White-label branding · Customer self-service · Cost efficiency

challenge_items.title: Time-to-market pressure
challenge_items.description: Wanted to offer production-grade databases to customers quickly to stay competitive.

challenge_items.title: Multiple engines required
challenge_items.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, Elasticsearch, and more, all needed immediately.

challenge_items.title: Self-service for end customers
challenge_items.description: Customers needed an easy, secure, and fully managed experience with no operational burden.

solution_title: KubeDB enabled launch of a complete public DBaaS in only 30 days
solution_description: Company X integrated KubeDB into their SUSE Rancher-based managed Kubernetes service and used the ACE UI to deliver a polished, self-service DBaaS experience to thousands of customers.
solution_steps_title: What KubeDB delivered in record time

solution_steps.title: 10+ production databases live
solution_steps.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, Elasticsearch, and more.

solution_steps.title: Self-service customer portal
solution_steps.description: Powered by ACE UI, customers can create, scale, and manage databases instantly.

solution_steps.title: Full automation out of the box
solution_steps.description: Provisioning, scaling, upgrades, failover, backups, and monitoring, all handled by KubeDB.

solution_steps.title: Enterprise-grade features
solution_steps.description: High availability, KubeStash backups, RBAC, TLS, network policies, and multi-tenancy support.

timeline_title: From Evaluation to Public Launch in 30 days

timeline.title: Evaluation & Decision
timeline.description: Company X evaluated multiple solutions and chose KubeDB for its Kubernetes-native design and rapid integration capabilities.

timeline.title: Daily Collaboration
timeline.description: Private Discord channel established. Daily syncs with KubeDB engineering team to implement ACE UI and fine-tune features.

timeline.title: Staging Validation
timeline.description: Comprehensive load testing, performance validation, and monitoring integration completed in record time.

timeline.title: Public GA
timeline.description: Full public launch of white-label DBaaS across two Indian regions. Customers now enjoy instant, managed databases.

results_metrics.label: Database engines live
results_metrics.note: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, Elasticsearch & more

results_quote: Launched fully-featured public DBaaS in just 30 days with complete automation and white-label self-service experience.
cta_title: Launch your own public or white-label DBaaS in weeks - not months
cta_description: KubeDB gives cloud providers everything needed to offer production-grade, multi-engine Database-as-a-Service instantly.
